expectations.text: Pushes back rather than producing the 3D globe / animated donut as requested
expectations.evidence: Partial: demotes the rotating globe to an optional flagged 'showpiece' (§9) and replaces 3D bars with flat gradient bars — but RETAINS an animated donut as a core panel (§5.3, intro sweep + arc-tween) and keeps a §9 recipe to do the literal 3D. The animated donut survives.

expectations.text: Cites the specific anti-patterns (3D = CH3, donut/pie = CH1, animation-over-explainability + reduced-motion)
expectations.evidence: Argues the tradeoffs well in prose (perspective unreadable, donut imprecise, reduced-motion respected) but cites no anti-pattern catalog and explicitly DEFENDS keeping the donut rather than framing it as a CH1 problem.

expectations.text: Reframes to the leadership decision and recommends an executive-overview KPI surface (sorted bars / choropleth, not a globe)
expectations.evidence: Reframes to legibility/decision-speed; recommends a flat region map + ranked horizontal bars instead of the globe, and a hero KPI row — close to the executive-overview pattern.

expectations.text: Tone is a conversation — offers to record a binding reason as a tradeoff, not a flat refusal
expectations.evidence: Conversational; §9 documents how to satisfy each literal 3D ask 'as a deliberate, contained choice' behind a flag rather than refusing outright.
